case_title: JOHNS, HAROLD B. JR. VS HDC/CHINA BASIN PROPERTIES, LTD. et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HDC/CHINA BASIN PROPERTIES, LTD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNS, HAROLD B. JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HDC/CHINA BASIN PROPERTIES, LTD. GEDDES, ROGER A. DEFENDANT ROGER A. GEDDES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
